## Journal.JournalLibrary.getJournalsForFilling() method

Gets all [filling recipe journal records](./ts-chocolate.journal.ifillingrecipejournalrecord.md) for a filling (across all versions)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForFilling(fillingId: FillingId): ReadonlyArray<IFillingRecipeJournalRecord>;
```
